webhook.title: Webhook notifications
webhook.description: Sends a POST request to the URL when the AI completes a task (JSON: event, projectId, projectName, timestamp)

browser_notify.title: Browser notifications
browser_notify.description: The browser will pop up a notification when the AI finishes a task. Permission is requested on first Dashboard visit.

pomodoro.section_desc: Restart the timer for changes to take effect
pomodoro.howto_item_1: Click the icon in the project page header to start
pomodoro.howto_item_2: A large countdown floats on screen without blocking
pomodoro.howto_item_3: Auto-switches to break after work, with a notification
pomodoro.howto_item_4: Auto-switches back to work after break
pomodoro.howto_item_5: Click the icon again to stop and reset

usage.section_desc: Pick the CLI tool whose usage you want to monitor — shown in dashboard header and project status bar
usage.info_item_1: Usage data is shown in the dashboard header and project status bar
usage.info_item_2: Claude Code queries via OAuth API, auto-refreshed every 5 minutes
usage.info_item_3: Other tools' usage queries will be supported in future versions
usage.info_item_4: No page reload needed after switching — usage updates automatically
usage.tool_codex_desc: OpenAI — usage query not yet implemented
usage.tool_opencode_desc: OpenCode — usage query not yet implemented
usage.tool_qwen_desc: Qwen — usage query not yet implemented
usage.tool_gemini_desc: Google — usage query not yet implemented

project_header.sync_button_title: Sync to rsync server (configure in Settings)
